## Issue

## Jira / story reference
Link the corresponding Jira ticket or external story item (if applicable).

<!-- https://your-org.atlassian.net/browse/ABC-123 -->

## User story statement
Write it exactly in the form "As a ..., I want ..., so that ..."

<!-- As a personal user, I want to log in, so that I can view my saved summaries. -->

## Explanation / context
Why does this story matter? What user problem or project goal does it support?

<!-- Explain the motivation and context for this story. -->

## Acceptance criteria
One requirement per line.

<!--
- User can access login screen from web app or extension
- User can sign in successfully
- Session expires securely after inactivity
-->

## Stretch acceptance criteria
One requirement per line.

<!--
- Criterion that is not necessarily required, but nice to have
-->

## Notes / constraints
Dependencies, technical notes, edge cases, links, or design constraints.

<!-- Mention blockers, dependencies, APIs, architecture notes, or linked docs. -->

## Sprint
Record the intended sprint. Also add the matching sprint label manually, e.g. sprint:1.

- Sprint 1
- Sprint 2
- Sprint 3
- Sprint 4
- Sprint 5
- Backlog / Unscheduled

## Story points
Record the estimate. Also add the matching story-point label manually, e.g. sp:8.

- "1"
- "2"
- "3"
- "5"
- "8"
- "13"

## Priority

- Low
- Medium
- High
- Critical

## Primary area
Also add a matching area label manually if you use them.

- Frontend
- Backend
- AI / Analysis
- Extension
- Infrastructure / DevOps
- Data / Storage
- Security / Auth
- Notifications
- QA / Reliability

## Definition of done
What must be true before this story can be closed?

<!--
- Acceptance criteria satisfied
- Tests added or updated
- Documentation updated if needed
- Reviewed and merged
-->

## Note
Any additional notes?

<!-- Add any optional context, links, or decisions. -->
